creator: jaap@NLnetLabs.nl
text:
(In reply to Fernando Apesteguía from comment #1
The maintainer (me) was about to issue a similar PR. I can still send it to replace this one, but if you want to go ahead with this version, here ae some notes:

I cannot add the URL but it is https://www.nlnetlabs.nl/news/2023/Jan/12/unbound-1.17.1-released/

The release notes can be found at https://www.nlnetlabs.nl/projects/unbound/download/#unbound-1-17-1.

     jaap
